html:
Exclusive to:

The Tackle Receptacle is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It requires 1 Driftwood Piece, 1 Bone Shards, and 1 Electrical Doodad to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.

When standing close to a Tackle Receptacle, the players are able to prototype crafting recipes for all Spoon and Spinnerbait Lures and all Floats in the Fishing Filter.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Shelled Collection
Shellacked Tackle Receptacle
The fish shell fear you.

Trivia

  • The Tackle Receptacle was introduced in the Hook, Line, and Inker update.
  • Before the She Sells Sea Shells update, it required 4 Driftwood Pieces, 1 Spoiled Fish, and 1 Electrical Doodad to craft.
  • When hammered or burned, the Tackle Receptacle drops everything needed to make a new one, making it technically portable.
  • Before the March 2022 QoL update, players had to stand next to the Tackle Receptacle every time they had to craft. Also, Adverts had to be inserted into the Tackle Receptacle in order to craft that Advert's recipe.

Assets

Tackle ReceptacleShellacked Tackle Receptacle

“Time to tackle my reel problems.”
–Wilson
“Gross, it looks full of bugs.”
–Willow
“Make better rod for fish!”
–Wolfgang
“All fish beware.”
–Wendy
“MAXIMIZE FISHING EFFICIENCY”
–WX-78
“I can improve my chances of success with better fishing implements.”
–Wickerbottom
“Been a while since I went on a fishing trip.”
–Woodie
“I suppose I could use a relaxing day of fishing.”
–Maxwell
“I shall create a fishing weapön like nö öther!”
–Wigfrid
“Father used to take me fishing sometimes.”
–Webber
“I've got bigger fish to fry! And bake, and poach, and...”
–Warly
“Help catch Glub Glubs”
–Wormwood
“Need the right tool for the job!”
–Winona
“Let's build a better fish trap, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“That not how you treat fish, florp!”
–Wurt
“Not to brag, but I do have my fishing badge.”
–Walter
“Fishing is so bothersome, it takes so much time and preparation!”
–Wanda
The Tackle Receptacle is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It requires 1 Driftwood Piece, 1 Bone Shards, and 1 Electrical Doodad to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.
When standing close to a Tackle Receptacle, the players are able to prototype crafting recipes for all Spoon and Spinnerbait Lures and all Floats in the Fishing Filter.

The Tackle Receptacle was introduced in the Hook, Line, and Inker update.
Before the She Sells Sea Shells update, it required 4 Driftwood Pieces, 1 Spoiled Fish, and 1 Electrical Doodad to craft.
When hammered or burned, the Tackle Receptacle drops everything needed to make a new one, making it technically portable.
Before the March 2022 QoL update, players had to stand next to the Tackle Receptacle every time they had to craft. Also, Adverts had to be inserted into the Tackle Receptacle in order to craft that Advert's recipe.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hộp chứa Đồ giải quyết là một Cấu trúc chế tạo độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó cần 1 Mảnh Gỗ Lũa, 1 Mảnh Xương và 1 Doodad Điện để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu.
